creator: thomas@mecadtron.de
text:
Clamav-0.95.3 cannot be compiled from the ports collection. All previous versions could be compiled without problems. Apparently there is a problem with the version.h file in the libclamav subdirectory. From the Makefile I can see that it is created automatically from a version.h.tmp or version.h.static file but there is a call to git in the Makefile. Git is not installed here and the prerequesits do not ask for it. Not sure how to fix this.

Fix: 

Not sure. Maybe the Makefile has to be fixed and a version.h.static or version.h.tmp must be made part of the distribution.
How-To-Repeat: 	Update the ports tree and do a
 cd /usr/ports/security/clamav; make
